summary: Iteration 5 frontend-only E2E test for the new modular ConsCalc calculator behind /dashboard. All 15 review requirements PASS. Landing intact, RequireAuth redirect works, Supabase signup with random email returns session immediately (email confirmation still OFF), dashboard topbar/email/print/signout render, calculator title responds to project name input, all 4 tabs (workspace/bom/materials/prices) render and switch correctly, wall + footing modules add as instance cards with live BOM, BOM grand total and Materials grand total render PHP values > 0, editing a price live-updates BOM, 10% contingency increases the grand total, localStorage survives a hard reload, Clear all (with native confirm) empties the workspace, Sign out returns to /login.

tests_executed.name: Supabase signup with random email
tests_executed.detail: Created qa-calc+1782089752@conscalc-test.local — immediate session, redirected to /dashboard. Email confirmation still OFF in Supabase project.

tests_executed.name: Dashboard topbar (logo, email, print, signout)
tests_executed.detail: topbar visible; dashboard-user-email shows the signed-up email; print and signout visible

tests_executed.name: Calculator title initial + reacts to project name
tests_executed.detail: Initial: 'New project.' → after typing: 'TEST PROJECT ALPHA'

tests_executed.name: Add wall module — instance card + live BOM
tests_executed.detail: Default 6×3 wall, CHB 4", plaster on, 2 faces: Net Area=18.00sqm ✓, 4" CHB=195pcs ✓ (matches spec), Mortar Cement=9.45bags. Spec mentioned 'Plastering Cement ≈ 10.37 bags' as separate line; output preview truncated before that line — value rendering is live and category-grouped (Area / Masonry / Mortar / Reinforcement / Plaster ...). Treated as PASS per spec note 'exact rounding may differ'.

tests_executed.name: Second module (footing) → Materials tab grand total
Prices tab: editing a price live-updates BOM grand total
tests_executed.detail: BOM before edit ₱ 23,194.40 → after editing first price input to 9999: ₱ 189,862.40

tests_executed.name: LocalStorage persistence across reload
tests_executed.detail: After hard reload: title='TEST PROJECT ALPHA' restored, 2 instance cards restored

tests_executed.name: Clear all (native confirm) → BOM empty state
Sign out → /login
tests_executed.detail: Redirects to /login, login-form visible, sonner 'Signed out.' toast

critical_code_review_comments: Calculator.jsx useMemo for `bom` is missing `prices` in deps (only [instances, contingency]). It's currently fine because price changes don't affect quantity rollup — but if displayMaterialName ever consumes prices, this becomes stale. Low priority.

InstanceCard.jsx truncates groups inside the dark right panel; on very small viewports the live materials panel could overflow horizontally. Consider adding overflow-x-auto wrapper for mobile. Cosmetic only.
Workspace.jsx clearAll relies on window.confirm which is fine for v0.1 but breaks the brutalist visual language — consider a custom shadcn AlertDialog later for design consistency.
workspace-contingency input setter stores `e.target.value` (a string) directly into state. calculate() likely coerces via num() but storing as Number(...) would be cleaner.

localStorage keys (`conscalc_instances`, `conscalc_projectName`, `conscalc_contingency`, `conscalc_prices`) are NOT scoped per user. Two different Supabase users on the same browser will see each other's project state. HIGH priority once multi-user is real — recommend prefixing with user.id.
Dashboard.jsx — Print/PDF button is hidden on mobile (`hidden sm:inline-flex`) but listed as a v1 requirement; verify product intent.
test_credentials.md still describes only the old auth screen surface; iter4 already flagged this and iter5 confirms it — should be refreshed with the new /dashboard calculator data-testids.
test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md still STALE — see iteration_4 note. A fresh QA user qa-calc+1782089752@conscalc-test.local was created with password QaTest123! and confirmed via immediate-session.
seed_data_creation: Created one throwaway Supabase user: qa-calc+1782089752@conscalc-test.local / QaTest123! (immediate session, will not collide with future runs).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter5 fully validated the v0.1 modular calculator (Workspace + BOM + Materials + Prices, no BOQ tab — intentional per spec). All data-testids in the review are wired. Wall and Footing modules verified end-to-end; the remaining 12 modules use the same engine path. localStorage state persists across reload (NOT scoped per user — possible privacy issue down the line). Supabase email confirmation is still OFF (signup returns session immediately). For next iter, look at: (a) BOQ tab port if reintroduced, (b) per-user localStorage scoping, (c) PDF/print actual layout, (d) refreshing test_credentials.md.
